Tim the Yowie Man shares 15 years of investigation into the most mysterious and haunted places in Australia. Rachael Kohn: The Monte Cristo Homestead in Junee, New South Wales, is the most haunted house in Australia, according to Tim the Yowie Man. This is The Ark, on ABC Radio National, with me, Rachael Kohn. This week, 'The Steve Irwin of Spooks' tells us some tall tales from the city to the outback. Monte Cristo is just one of the places people feel a shiver going up their spine: phantom piano playing, apparitions at the foot of the bed, a chill in the air. They've all been reported. But spooks don't just scare.

evidence_summary: Tour guide shares ghost stories and chilling experiences from Port Arthur Historic Site The Port Arthur Historic Site ghost tour manager shares some chilling experiences visitors have reported. It's known as one of Australia's most haunted places, and every year 20,000 people brave a ghost tour at the Port Arthur Historic Site. Guiding manager Jake Bradshaw shares some stories with ABC Tasmania Afternoons presenter Joel Rheinberger, including the one that gets the biggest reaction from visitors. From pickaxe murders, the "Blue Lady" and the Parsonage, Mr Bradshaw says there's plenty of chilling stories from the old convict site. title: The spooky Aussie folklore of Fisher's Ghost
australian_relation: ABC public media item concerning Australian haunted/local-legend place evidence.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC text names `Campbelltown` in a ghost/supernatural context; gazetteer result state-checked as Campbelltown City Council, Campbelltown, New South Wales, 2560, Australia.
evidence_summary: The spooky Aussie folklore of Fisher's Ghost The Legend of Fisher’s Ghost is one of Australia’s most intriguing tales of folklore. The Legend of Fisher’s Ghost is one of Australia’s most intriguing tales of folklore. Originating in Campbelltown, NSW, the 1826 yarn tells of a murdered farmer whose apparition guided authorities to his hidden body, resulting in the conviction of his killer. Michael Adams joins Philip Clark for a spooky retelling of the tale on Nightlife History. podcast forlisten fisher's ghost The spooky Aussie folkelore of Fisher's Ghost 1826 yarn tells of a murdered farmer intriguing tales of folklore nightlife abcradio philipclark nightlifehistory
